title: aster lautureanus var. lautureanus
intro: Aster lautureanus var. lautureanus, also known as the French aster, is a variety of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactone compounds and saponins. The health benefits of Aster lautureanus var. lautureanus include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and easing respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea infusions, tinctures, and infusions in oil, which can be used internally or applied topically for skin conditions and wounds.
